race_meta.race_name: DragonBet The Roar Before Cheltenham Extra Places EBF Junior 'National Hunt' Hurdle (Class 4)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner mecene (fr) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Mecene with 28.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Mecene > Sixty's Rock, but actual result was Mecene (FR) > See Me Later. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
